summary: Spec review accepts the Stage 6 Core action request/risk classification spine as bounded validate-only/draft/preview admission and no-submit guard truth for #167/#168/#169/#170.
reviewed_validation_summary: `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/core-runtime test`; `pnpm --filter @webenvoy/schemas test`; `pnpm conformance`; `pnpm typecheck`; `git diff --check`; `loom verify --target . --json`; `loom fact-chain --target . --json` passed locally.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The spec keeps Core as action request, risk classification, no-submit guard, admission, Run Record, and schema owner while excluding approval execution, true writes, post-submit results, reconciliation, App UI, and raw/private upstream material.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: The planned implementation is limited to Core runtime admission, schema fixtures, and item-specific Loom carrier for CORE-167.
